sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13763" key="a)pospa/dwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσπάδων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n13763.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σπάδων</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
